mapper.select: SELECT id, image_url as imageUrl, point_name as pointName, point_required as pointQuery, point_number as pointNumber, point_description as pointDescription, status, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt FROM adminPoints

SELECT id, image_url as imageUrl, point_name as pointName, point_required as pointQuery, point_number as pointNumber, point_description as pointDescription, status, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt FROM adminPoints
AND ( point_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR point_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT id, image_url as imageUrl, point_name as pointName, point_required as pointQuery, point_number as pointNumber, point_description as pointDescription, status, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt FROM adminPoints WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE adminPoints SET point_name = #{pointName}, point_required = #{pointQuery}, point_number = #{pointNumber}, point_description = #{pointDescription}, status=#{status}, updated_at = NOW(), created_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE adminPoints SET point_name = #{pointName}, point_required = #{pointQuery}, point_number = #{pointNumber}, point_description = #{pointDescription}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), created_at = NOW(), WHERE id = #{id}
